briefdescription.para: These constants specify different types of handler and used to differentiate interrupt requests from peripheral.
These constants specify different types of authentication requests that can be initiated within a peripheral.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Bit in the cipher Bz register to indicate Repeater.
This function initializes an HDCP cipher.
This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------------------- ----------------------------------- (XHDCP1X_CIPHER_HANDLER_LINK_FAILURE) LinkFailCallback (XHDCP1X_CIPHER_HANDLER_Ri_UPDATE) RiUpdateCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP cipher core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the reporting of link check state changes.
This function queries the link state of a cipher device.
This function enables/disables the reporting of Ri update notifications.
This function enables a HDCP cipher.
This function disables a HDCP cipher.
This function configures the key selection value.

parameterdescription.para: is the desired key select value.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a request within the HDCP cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to submit the request to.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_ENABLE if the core is disabled.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the core is busy.

briefdescription.para: This function queries the progress of the current request.
This function retrieves the current number of lanes of the HDCP cipher.
This function configures the number of lanes of the HDCP cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of lanes to configure.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Mode of the HDCP cipher to MST/ SST.
This function retrieves the current encryption stream map.

simplesect.para: In the case of the receiver version of this core, the XOR in progress bit needs to be checked as well as the encryption map to fully determine if encryption is enabled for the SST case. This is the reason for the additional check in this code.

briefdescription.para: This function enables encryption on a set of streams.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to enable encryption on.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_ENABLE if the core is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption on a set of streams.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to disable encryption on.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_ENABLE if the core is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the local KSV value from the cipher.
This function reads the remote KSV value from the cipher.
This function writes the remote KSV value to the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the remote KSV value to write.

simplesect.para: Whenever this function is called, the underlying driver will initiate the calculation of the Km value and wait for it to complete.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the B register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is to be loaded with the contents of Bx.
is to be loaded with the contents of By.
is to be loaded with the contents of Bz.

simplesect.para: A NULL pointer can be passed in any of X, Y and Z. If so, then this portion of the B register is not returned to the caller.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u32 X, u32 Y, u32 Z)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_CipherSetB

briefdescription.para: This function writes the contents of the B register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the value to be written to Bx.
is the value to be written to By.
is the value to be written to Bz.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the K register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is to be loaded with the contents of Kx.
is to be loaded with the contents of Ky.
is to be loaded with the contents of Kz.

simplesect.para: A NULL pointer can be passed in any of X, Y and Z. If so, then this portion of the K register is not returned to the caller.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u32 X, u32 Y, u32 Z)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_CipherSetK

briefdescription.para: This function writes the contents of the K register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the value to be written to Kx.
is the value to be written to Ky.
is the value to be written to Kz.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the Mi/An register of BM0.
This function reads the contents of the Ri register of BM0.
This function reads the contents of the Mo register of the device.

simplesect.para: The contents of the Mo register.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the Ro register of the device.

simplesect.para: The contents of the Ro register.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the version of the HDCP cipher core.

simplesect.para: The version of the HDCP cipher device.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the cipher core driver.
This function sets the cipher blank value to 0x0000FF (blue), and sets the cipher blank select to TRUE.
This function sets the cipher blank select to FALSE.
